subcodes.title: Words to Mountfort Mills in 1921
subcodes.first_line: In one prayer I could have health the remainder of My life, but it is necessary for Me to suffer to show others that these things can be borne and overcome.
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the power of example
